proof-seed/v1.description: Prove that LaneOutcome::Findings always maps to code_findings and LaneOutcome::Failed always maps to gate_failures in assemble_report.
proof-seed/v1.risk: H1: Finding/failure confusion — semantically wrong report
proof-seed/v1.notes: Enum discriminant-based mapping at the type level; no runtime cast possible.

proof-seed/v1.description: Prove Report::Reject always has non-empty code_findings OR gate_failures.
proof-seed/v1.notes: Guarded by check_reject_not_empty in Report::reject smart constructor.

proof-seed/v1.description: Prove QualityReceiptV1 always serializes with schema_version = 1.
proof-seed/v1.notes: Hardcoded in QualityReceiptV1::new and enforced in deserialization.

proof-seed/v1.description: Prove FUNC_LOOPS_FOR always maps to RepairHint::UseIteratorPipeline and CLIPPY_UNWRAP_USED always maps to RepairHint::RequiresHumanReview.
proof-seed/v1.notes: YAML-embedded rules are compile-time constants; clippy_normalizer uses deterministic uppercase mapping.

proof-seed/v1.description: Prove all RuleIds in the system satisfy the invariant: uppercase ASCII with at least one underscore.
proof-seed/v1.notes: RuleId::new enforces at construction; all production code uses RuleId::new or hardcodes valid strings.

proof-seed/v1.description: Prove Report::Pass always has non-empty per_lane.
proof-seed/v1.notes: Guarded by check_per_lane_not_empty in Report::pass smart constructor.

proof-seed/v1.description: Prove RejectKind is correctly derived from code_findings and gate_failures emptiness.
proof-seed/v1.notes: const fn with boolean logic on collection emptiness — trivially correct.

proof-seed/v1.description: Prove the killer demo test accounts for Dylint lane infrastructure failures in test workspaces.
proof-seed/v1.risk: H4: Dylint lane infra-failure in test workspaces
proof-seed/v1.notes: Dylint .so may not be available in TempDir workspaces; test must handle or skip this lane.

proof-seed/v1.description: Prove the repaired fixture cannot trigger any ast-grep or clippy findings.
proof-seed/v1.risk: H7: False positive — repaired fixture triggers a finding
proof-seed/v1.notes: Fixture must be minimal: no println!, no unwrap_or, no wildcards, no Result<String, T>.
